title: horkelia sabulosa
intro: Horkelia sabulosa, also known as sand-tan horkelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Horkelia sabulosa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential in treating various diseases such as cancer and Alzheimer's disease. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
